preconditions: User is on the login page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page

preconditions: User is on the login page
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: 'Epic sadface: Username is required.'

preconditions: User is on the login page
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.'

test_cases.test_case: Login attempt with maximum length username
preconditions: User is on the login page
steps: 1. Enter a username with maximum allowed length (e.g., 20 characters)
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Product Inventory page

test_cases.test_case: Add item to cart from Product Inventory
preconditions: User is logged in and on the Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Click on 'Add to cart' button for a product
test_cases.expected_result: Item is added to the cart and the button changes to 'Remove'; cart badge count updates accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to checkout with missing required fields
preconditions: User is on the Checkout - Information page
test_cases.expected_result: Error banners display: 'Error: First Name is required', 'Error: Last Name is required', 'Error: Postal Code is required'

test_cases.test_case: Checkout with maximum length Zip/Postal Code
preconditions: User is on the Checkout - Information page
steps: 3. Enter a Zip/Postal Code with maximum allowed length
test_cases.expected_result: User proceeds to the Checkout - Overview page

preconditions: User is on the Checkout - Overview page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Checkout - Confirmation page with a success message

preconditions: User is logged in and on the Product Inventory page
steps: 2. Attempt to access the Product Inventory page
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the login page

preconditions: User is logged in and on the Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Click on 'Reset App State' from the hamburger menu
test_cases.expected_result: App state is reset, cart is cleared, and add/remove button states are reset
